title: Electronic apparatus including a strap and method of controlling the same
abstract: The present disclosure relates generally to an electronic apparatus and a method of controlling the same, and more particularly, to an electronic apparatus including a strap and a method of controlling the electronic apparatus using various arrangement forms of the strap. The electronic apparatus includes a strap, a sensor configured to measure a position and angle at which the strap is bent, a display, and a processor configured to display a user interface (UI) element corresponding to the measured position and angle on the display.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) An electronic apparatus comprising: a strap; a sensor configured to measure a position and angle at which the strap is bent; a display; and a processor configured to display a user interface (UI) element corresponding to the measured position and angle on the display. The electronic apparatus of claim 1, wherein the processor is further configured to detect a user interaction corresponding to the measured position and angle and to display the UI element corresponding to the detected user interaction on the display. The electronic apparatus of claim 1, wherein the strap comprises a flexible wire for maintaining a shape of the strap, and wherein the sensor comprises a flex sensor. The electronic apparatus of claim 1, wherein the sensor comprises a position sensor configured to detect a relative position between the strap and the display, and wherein the processor is further configured to detect a user interaction based on the measured position and angle and the detected relative position. The electronic apparatus of claim 4, wherein the processor is further configured to determine a wearing form of the electronic apparatus based on the detected relative position. The electronic apparatus of claim 4, wherein the processor is further configured to identify an operating state of the electronic apparatus based on the detected relative position. The electronic apparatus of claim 6, wherein the processor is further configured to determine a number of straps disposed in a same direction based on the detected relative position, and identify an operating state of the electronic apparatus based on the number of the straps. The electronic apparatus of claim 6, wherein the processor is further configured to displays the UI element corresponding to the identified operating state and the detected user interaction on the display. The electronic apparatus of claim 4, wherein the position sensor comprises a plurality of magnets disposed in the strap and a plurality of hall sensors disposed in the display. The electronic apparatus of claim 4, wherein the position sensor comprises a plurality of hall sensors disposed in the strap and a plurality of magnets disposed in the display. The electronic apparatus of claim 1, further comprising a touch portion configured to detect a user touch, wherein the processor is further configured to detect a user interaction corresponding to the measured position and angle only when a user touch is detected. An electronic apparatus comprising: a strap; a sensor configured to measure a position and angle at which the strap is bent; a processor configured to detect a user interaction corresponding to the measured position and angle; and a communicator configured to transmit a control command corresponding to the detected user interaction to another electronic apparatus. The electronic apparatus of claim 12, further comprising a microphone configured to receive a sound wave to generate voice data, wherein the communicator is further configured to transmit the generated voice data to the another electronic apparatus. The electronic apparatus of claim 12, wherein: the communicator is further configured to receive voice data from the another electronic apparatus, and wherein the electronic apparatus further comprises a speaker configured to output the received voice data. A method of controlling an electronic apparatus including a strap, the method comprising: measuring a position and angle at which the strap is bent; and displaying a user interface (UI) element corresponding to the measured position and angle.
